languages.text: "Выживание, {name}. Среди мириад врагов, стремящихся нас истребить, среди жестоких звезд, таящих в себе непознаваемые ужасы, среди предателей, сулящих смерть собратьям. Мы хотим выжить. Смерть неизбежна — это неопровержимый факт. Но выжить достаточно долго, чтобы те, кто останется после достигли того, что не смогли достичь мы — вот стремление, достойное человека".

"Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."
languages.original_text: "Выживание, {name}. Среди мириад врагов, стремящихся нас истребить, среди жестоких звезд, таящих в себе непознаваемые ужасы, среди предателей, сулящих смерть собратьям. Мы хотим выжить. Смерть неизбежна — это неопровержимый факт. Но выжить достаточно долго, чтобы те, кто останется после достигли того, что не смогли достичь мы — вот стремление, достойное человека".

languages.text: 「生き残る、{name}。我々を滅ぼそうとする無数の敵、未知の恐怖を宿す残酷な星、我々の同胞を死へと導く裏切り者たち。我々は生き残りたい。死は避けられない。それは確かな事実だ。しかし、残された者たちが我々が果たせなかったことを成し遂げるまで生き残る。それは人類にふさわしい努力だ」
languages.original_text: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「生き残る、{名前}。我々を滅ぼそうとする無数の敵、未知の恐怖を宿す残酷な星、我々の同胞を死へと導く裏切り者たち。我々は生き残りたい。死は避けられない。それは確かな事実だ。しかし、残された者たちが我々が果たせなかったことを成し遂げるまで生き残る。それは人類にふさわしい努力だ。」

languages.text: “为了生存，舰长大人。在无数妄图灭绝我们的敌人之间，在潜藏着不可名状之恐怖的群星之间，在那些誓言屠戮人类的叛徒之中，我们渴望生存。死亡不可避免，这无可否认。但让后来者得以完成我们未竟之业——那才是值得人类为之奋斗的事业。”
languages.original_text: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “为了生存，舰长大人。在无数妄图灭绝我们的敌人之间，在潜藏着不可名状之恐怖的群星之间，在那些誓言屠戮人类的叛徒之中，我们渴望生存。死亡不可避免，这无可否认。但让后来者得以完成我们未竟之业——那才是值得人类为之奋斗的事业。”

languages.text: «La supervivencia, {name}. Entre la miríada de enemigos que pretenden exterminarnos, entre las estrellas crueles que albergan horrores incognoscibles, entre los traidores que prometen la muerte a sus congéneres... queremos sobrevivir. La muerte es inevitable; es un hecho indisputable. Pero sobrevivir lo suficiente para que quienes nos sigan logren lo que nosotros no conseguimos... ese es un esfuerzo digno de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «La supervivencia, {name}. Entre la miríada de enemigos que pretenden exterminarnos, entre las estrellas crueles que albergan horrores incognoscibles, entre los traidores que prometen la muerte a sus congéneres... queremos sobrevivir. La muerte es inevitable; es un hecho indisputable. Pero sobrevivir lo suficiente para que quienes nos sigan logren lo que nosotros no conseguimos... ese es un esfuerzo digno de la Humanidad».

languages.text: "Wir streben danach, zu überleben, {name}. Unter Myriaden von Feinden, die uns auslöschen wollen, unter grausamen Sternen, die unsagbare Schrecken bergen, unter Verrätern, die unseren Mitmenschen den Tod versprechen. Wir wollen überleben. Der Tod ist unvermeidbar ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Aber lange genug zu überleben, damit unsere Nachkommen erreichen, was uns verwehrt blieb ... das ist eine Mission, die der Menschheit würdig ist."
languages.original_text: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."

Aber lange genug zu überleben, damit unsere Nachkommen erreichen, was uns verwehrt blieb ... das ist eine Mission, die der Menschheit würdig ist."

languages.text: « La survie, {name}. Parmi les myriades d'ennemis qui cherchent à nous exterminer, parmi les astres cruels qui abritent des horreurs incompréhensibles, parmi les traîtres qui promettent la mort aux autres humains. Nous voulons survivre. Personne n'échappe à la mort, c'est un fait irréfutable. Mais survivre assez longtemps pour permettre à ceux qui restent de transformer nos échecs en victoires, c'est là une entreprise digne de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."

languages.text: "Hayatta kalmak... Bizi yok etmeye çalışan sayısız düşman arasında, bilinemez dehşetler barındıran acımasız yıldızlar arasında, diğer insanlara ölüm vaat eden hainler arasında. Hayatta kalmak istiyoruz. Ölüm kaçınılmazdır. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçek. Ancak geride kalanların bizim başaramadıklarımızı başarması için yeterince uzun süre hayatta kalmak... İşte bu, İnsanlığa yakışır bir çabadır."
languages.original_text: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans.
